description: Three coupled changes to ir_codegen.rs (atomic commit). A: needs_blanket_retag — add Term::Goto(..) => false before _ => true. B: new pre-terminator block for Goto: zip f.block(target).params with args, derive want=ArgRepr::from_descr(fn_types.vars.get(param)), coerce_to when repr differs, update var_env. C: block param registration line 4405: replace repr: ArgRepr::Tagged with ArgRepr::from_descr(fn_types.vars.get(p).cloned().unwrap_or_else(Descr::any)).
title: fz-ul4.rep.2: repr-aware Goto coercion + block param repr registration
